creator: jrhett@netconsonance.com
text:
When did this change? It absolutely wasn't broken since apache 1.3.  I was happily using the WITH_BDB_BASE settings with apache 2.0 and then 2.2 right up until I tried to recompile for 2.2.21. So it was broken between 2.2.17 and 2.2.21.

Finally, the dbmmanage which ships with apache only works with the built in db, so clearly it is intended to work. Something was broken in the port.

-- 
Jo Rhett
Net Consonance : net philanthropy to improve open source and internet projects.
